title: SCBE-AETHERMOORE Operations Hub
content:
# SCBE-AETHERMOORE Operations Hub

Central command for automated publishing, content scheduling, store operations, and work tracking. All content flows from here to Twitter/X, WordPress, Shopify, and GitHub via automation tools.
Quick Links: GitHub | Shopify | Gumroad | X/Twitter | Streamlit Demo | npm Package
🔗 https://github.com/issdandavis/SCBE-AETHERMOORE
🛒 https://aethermoorgames.myshopify.com
💰 https://aethermoorgames.gumroad.com
🐦 https://x.com/davisissac
🎮 https://scbe-aethermoore-ezaociw8wy6t5rnaynzvzc.streamlit.app📊 https://scbe-aethermoore-x8vu3ly.gamma.site
Tweet Queue
Automated tweet pipeline. Each row = 1 tweet. Polled by Scheduled.so or n8n every 15 min.
Articles Pipeline
Auto-publish to WordPress/Super.so via Zapier. Grok + GPT draft generation. Status = Ready triggers publish.
